title: Harder eye of ender
description: This make eyes of ender way harder
body:
![gewr](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0291c90c21662ed02b667211262bc004c95399a8.png)
# Harder Eye of Ender

## Turn the journey to the End into a true endgame challenge.

Tired of reaching the End in your first few hours? Harder Eye of Ender rebalances progression by giving the Eye of Ender a much tougher recipe — reserved for players who have truly conquered the overworld, Nether, and beyond.

## New Recipe

Crafting Eyes of Ender now requires rare treasures from every corner of Minecraft:

Netherite Ingot

Enchanted Golden Apple

Heavy Core

Totem of Undying

Wind Charge

Echo Shard

Heart of the Sea

Blaze Powder

Ender Pearl

The result: 12 Eyes of Ender, crafted only by true adventurers.

## Why Use This Pack

Adds late-game balance to End progression.

Perfect for hardcore, SMP, or progression-based modpacks.

No commands or setup required — drop it in and play.

Compatibility

Works as both Datapack and Fabric/Quilt Mod.
Fully compatible with Minecraft 1.21+.
Lightweight — no external dependencies.
